content.text:
I'll analyze this task as the Business Analyst. Let me first review the project documentation to understand existing patterns and components.
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">find /Users/dmitry/WebstormProjects/zephyr-budget-app/.claude/docs -type f -name "*.md" | head -20</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cat /Users/dmitry/WebstormProjects/zephyr-budget-app/.claude/docs/PROJECT_STRUCTURE.md</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cat /Users/dmitry/WebstormProjects/zephyr-budget-app/.claude/docs/COMPONENTS.md</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cat /Users/dmitry/WebstormProjects/zephyr-budget-app/.claude/docs/BUSINESS_RULES.md</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cat /Users/dmitry/WebstormProjects/zephyr-budget-app/.claude/docs/PATTERNS.md</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

Now I have a clear picture from the documentation. However, I need clarification on several key business requirements before I can produce a comprehensive specification. Let me ask the user:
<function_calls>
<invoke name="AskUserQuestion">
<parameter name="question">Which types of API errors should the modal display? Should it show:
- All HTTP error responses (4xx, 5xx)?
- Only specific error codes?
- Should it display the raw error message from the API or user-friendly messages?</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="AskUserQuestion">
<parameter name="question">How should the modal be triggered? Should it:
- Automatically appear whenever an API error occurs?
- Be triggered only for certain API endpoints or operations?
- Display errors from all API calls or just specific ones?</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="AskUserQuestion">
<parameter name="question">What should happen after the user closes the error modal? Should it:
- Simply dismiss and allow the user to continue?
- Clear any related UI state or data?
- Retry the failed operation?</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="AskUserQuestion">
<parameter name="question">Should the error modal be able to display:
- Multiple errors at once or just one error at a time?
- Detailed error information (error codes, timestamps) or just user-friendly messages?</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

Once you answer these clarifying questions, I will provide a complete business analyst specification including user stories, functional requirements, acceptance criteria, and scope definition based on the documented patterns and existing architecture.
